de.uka.ilkd.key.java.recoderext

Class KeYCrossReferenceServiceConfiguration

  • java.lang.Object
    • recoder.ServiceConfiguration

        • recoder.CrossReferenceServiceConfiguration
          • de.uka.ilkd.key.java.recoderext.KeYCrossReferenceServiceConfiguration

    ProofCrossReferenceServiceConfiguration, SchemaCrossReferenceServiceConfiguration

    public class KeYCrossReferenceServiceConfiguration
extends CrossReferenceServiceConfiguration

      The cross reference source info is a subclass of the source info, so this class simply overrides the source info factory method.
